steps.title: Use the two table points
steps.content:
From $(4,17)$ to $(6,23)$, the slope is:
$$m=\frac{23-17}{6-4}=3$$
Substituting $(4,17)$ into $y=mx+b$ gives $17=3(4)+b$, so $b=5$.

steps.title: Check the answer choices
steps.content: Choice B — $h(x)=3x+5$ is $h(x)=3x+5$, which matches the model. It also checks in the table: $h(4)=3(4)+5=17$ and $h(6)=3(6)+5=23$.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: $h(x)=\frac{1}{3}x-\frac{5}{3}$ gives $h(4)=-\frac{1}{3}$, not 17. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: $h(x)=3x+5$ gives $h(4)=17$ and $h(6)=23$. Correct.
  • Choice C: $h(x)=4x+17$ has slope 4, but the table's line has slope 3. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: $h(x)=6x+23$ has slope 6, not 3. Eliminated.
That matches Choice B — $h(x)=3x+5$.
